song.title: There Is No Other Name
song.author: Robin Mark
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D There is no other Name . Em C By which men can be saved. . G D C G There is no other Name under heaven. . G D There is rest for my soul . Em C And the wounded made whole . G D C G And the captives set free and forgiven.
(Repeat)
[C] .C D G Such love as I have never known .C D G Em I’ve found in the grace that flowed to me. . C In my unrighteousness . Am And this is why, . D My heart and soul and tongue confess (Jesus!)
